creator: obrien@NUXI.com
text:
>        patches/patch-ae
>        patches/patch-af
>        patches/patch-ai
>        patches/patch-clparse.c
>        patches/patch-common-Makefile.dist
>                context to unified diff.

The reson there is not context to these diffs is that with every new ISC
version, there would be patch conflicts due to the context changing.  There
is NOTHING wrong with not having any context when the patch effectively a
simple search and replace.

>        patches/patch-aj
>        patches/patch-dhclient.8
>                line numbers changes.

We do not update patches in this case as long as they still apply.  Otherwise
the commit to update a port falsely implies more change than there was.
